channel.title: Taken from Blogspot on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Taken from Blogspot on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Ric 22
item.description: Short description: Three sailing boats (spinnaker) Notes: Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 21
item.description: Short description: The Gedächniskirche in Berlin Notes: Quite unusual motive. Probably seen from Tauentzienstraße . Also see this picture from 1965 and look at the laterns Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 20
item.description: Short description: An alley Notes: Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 19
item.description: Short description: Sailing ship next to a harbour / town Notes: Similar to Ric 03 , but this one is signed a bit different. Maybe this one isn’t a print? Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 18
item.description: Short description: A marabu Notes: Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 17
item.description: Short description: Two sailings boats Notes: Similar to Ric 02 Similar to Ric 07 Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 16
item.description: Short description: Two sailings boats Notes: Higher resolution images are available Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 15
item.description: Short description: People on the shore next to a sailing boat Notes: Unusual rounded style, low image quality Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 14
item.description: Short description: A latern next to a stair (alley) Notes: Low quality image Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 13
item.description: Short description: Two birds Notes: Image has a very low quality Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 12
item.description: Short description: Alley with three lamps Notes: There seem to be no title on the lower left, but the image is cropped Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 11
item.description: Short description: Fishing nets and a ship Notes: No better image available Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 10
item.description: Short description: Sailing Boat Notes: Higher resolution images are available Other entries for this work

item.description: Short description: Three birds Notes: Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 08
item.description: Short description: Sailing boat next to a harbour / slip Notes: Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 07
item.description: Short description: Two sailings boats Notes: Similar to Ric 02 Similar to Ric 17 Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 06
item.description: Short description: Sailing Boats Notes: Also quite common Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 05
item.description: Short description: Sailing boat Notes: This is one of the most common prints, see Ric 05 Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 04
item.description: Short description: Ships (fishing boats) at a harbour Notes: No better image available yet Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 02
item.description: Short description: Two sailings boats Notes: Similar to Ric 07 Similar to Ric 17 Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 03
item.description: Short description: Sailing ship next to a harbour / town Notes: Similar to Ric 17 , but this one is signed a bit different. Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 01
item.description: Short description: Two sailing boats (Spinnaker ) Notes: Other entries for this work
